quotes.text: Everybody gangsta until someone runs SELECT * FROM users in production with no WHERE clause.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Blockchain: a database, but slower, and everyone can see your data.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The best database schema is the one that answers your questions without making you write a 47-line SQL query.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to choose your database was yesterday. The second best time is before you have 10,000 users, not after.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your database schema is the foundation of your house. Build it wrong and everything else crumbles.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your database is your system's memory. Treat it with respect. Backup it. Index it. Never let it forget.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If your database has more than 50 tables, you probably need a domain expert, not a better ORM.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every database query should have an index. Every index should have a reason. Every reason should be tested.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best database is the one you know best. Not the one that's trending on Hacker News.
quotes.author: based
